paragraphs: BTC drilled to $75,374, -2.54% on the day, -4.52% on the week. Breadth collapsed to 1/20 green, F&G held 28 Fear day two, $50B mcap shed. The leverage tail that decompressed yesterday inverted in spots today.

Perps tape QUIET. 100% NEUTRAL across 25 assets. The seven-asset WATCH bucket carries the action: BSB clears the funding gate on a +27% rip, EDEN broke -13.76% with funding -0.363%/8h, BEAT cascade started behind a long-trap shape. Narrative map promoted three RIDEs today. AI agents and DePIN flipped Peak to Rising, Hyperliquid pulled out of FADE and re-anchored on the Okada 53%-of-revenue thread.

AIXBT pulse calls Hormuz toll-push the structural mechanism. Iran's toll on the strait institutionalizes energy inflation, rate cuts price out, BTC at fear-28 is the regime read. ZEC tripled but XMR dropped from the lead. ZEC-specific catalyst, not a sector rotation. RWA hits ATH on tokenized stocks $1.2B and ETFs $425M while crypto bleeds. The rails expand structurally.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · risk-off into Fear day two. Narrative carriers AI/DePIN/Hyperliquid hold the RIDE side. ZEC SHORT promoted on the privacy fade, ONDO closed on invalidation.

current_positions.thesis_note: AI agents and DePIN both PROMOTED Peak to Rising today — narrative re-firmed in the same session the price unwound. Invalidation $2.05 sits 0.83% below the close.
current_positions.watch: $2.05 close is the line. Top L/S 1.78 holding inside the 7d band, OI -2.81% means late longs unwound without panic. Below $2.05 closes the position.

current_positions.thesis_note: Invalidation $56 breached at close $55.19. Same session: narrative promoted Fading to Peak, AIXBT names HYPE as #1 lead with $1.8M daily buybacks + Grayscale 3rd ETF filing, smart money L/S +0.15 over 7d. Thesis strengthens as the mechanical line breaks.
current_positions.invalidation: close below $54 (revised — original $56 breached but narrative validated in same session)
current_positions.watch: Top traders re-building (L/S 1.36, +0.15 7d) is the structural confirmation. Below $54 closes — that level holds the buyback-anchored support. A second close below $56 with smart-money L/S flipping back negative invalidates the revision.

current_positions.thesis_note: Invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%. RWA narrative holds 5/5 Peak but the carrier rotated to tokenized stocks $1.2B + ETFs $425M, not ONDO direct. AIXBT names Ondo only on the SEC tokenization-model angle — a regulatory thread, not a token bid.

new_positions.thesis: Watchlist trigger fired: close $594 below $620 line. Privacy/ZK FADING 5th day absent from narrative threads. AIXBT confirms ZEC was the idiosyncratic carrier, not a sector rotation — XMR dropped from the lead. Token-movers flips TRENDING+UP four days to TRENDING+DOWN MAJOR today, -9.18% on $577M vol. Top L/S 0.76 already net short.
risks: Top L/S 0.76 means crowd is already short — trade is partially priced
Privacy narrative can re-fire on a sanctions catalyst
Thin OI relative to other Tier 2 means a single-buyer counter-bounce moves the tape

watchlist.trigger: flat-or-red 24h with OI holding flat-to-positive fires DISTRIBUTION per perps-scan (gains-slowing gate clears tomorrow)
watchlist.thesis: Funding +0.0878%/8h clears the +0.08% Tier 2 DIST gate. OI +28.69% 24h on top of +275% 7d. Top L/S 1.95 down 0.56 over 7d — smart money exiting into retail leverage. Token-movers prints [BREAKOUT][PUMP-RISK] at rank #164 on vol/mcap 0.56. Gains-accelerating gate blocks DIST today only.

watchlist.trigger: funding crosses +0.08%/8h with another red day OR pct_4h -10% prints with OI still building
watchlist.invalidation: close above $1.30 (yesterday's high) before trigger fires
watchlist.thesis: Yesterday's +45.93% 24h rolled into -2.68% with OI still building +5.41%. Top L/S 1.30 down 0.65 over 7d — clean smart-money distribution. Cascade started: liq $1.23M past p75 $893K. Funding +0.024%/8h below the 0.08% LONG-TRAP gate. Today's token-call HIGH 9/10 LONG on the Arkham smart-money flag is the counter — perps positioning says retail bid, token-call says smart accumulation.

watchlist.trigger: second-day red with OI extending lower fires CAPITULATION-shaped flow
watchlist.thesis: New universe entrant. OI +146.17% 7d on range 71.93% — fresh, volatile setup carrying real leverage build. Top L/S 1.30 down 0.43 over 7d reads as smart money fading the entry. Vol 1.28x is the second-highest in today's universe. Funding still mid at +0.0045%/8h.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clean through 52% with OI continuing to build OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.thesis: Narrative-tracker PROMOTED Decentralized compute Peak to Rising today — architectural-disruptor angle broadens the thesis. TAO holds tight at $264, range 15.87%, OI -3.42% 24h but +0.39% 7d. Funding flat. Setup forming, no trigger.

evaluations.note: Day 2/3. -11.10% from fire, invalidation $2.05 sits 0.83% below close. Narrative-tracker promoted AI agents and DePIN Peak to Rising today — fresh tailwind on the bull case. Holding.

Day 2/multi-week. Close $55.19 below $56 invalidation — breach recorded. Same session narrative-tracker promoted Hyperliquid Fading to Peak, AIXBT names HYPE as #1 lead with $1.8M daily buybacks and Grayscale 3rd ETF filing, smart money L/S +0.15 over 7d. Thesis strengthens as the line breaks. Revising invalidation to $54 — that level holds the buyback-anchored support.
Day 2/7. Invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%. RWA carrier rotated to tokenized stocks $1.2B + ETFs $425M, not ONDO direct. -17.21% return, -14.57pp vs BTC, -13.83pp vs ETH. LOSS.

close.close_reason: invalidation breached at close; RWA narrative carrier rotated to tokenized stocks/ETFs not ONDO direct
